title: Localhost references
summary: Development URLs such as localhost or 127.0.0.1 should not ship in a WordPress.org plugin release.

guidance.why_it_matters: Local development endpoints in shipped code often indicate an incomplete or unsafe release build.
guidance.fix: Replace development URLs with production endpoints or configurable settings that are safe for release.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. Comments, docs, or examples may be intentional.
